---
title: "Q1 2026 Facebook Ads Dashboard"
subtitle: "Dashboard for a fictional Facebook ads campaign"
format:
  dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    theme: cosmo
    scrolling: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| context: setup
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(bslib)
library(gt)

raw_data <- readr::read_csv("facebook_ads_mock_q1_2026.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

total_impr <- sum(raw_data$impr, na.rm = TRUE)
total_clicks <- sum(raw_data$clicks, na.rm = TRUE)
total_purchases <- sum(raw_data$purchases, na.rm = TRUE)

ad_name_breakdown <- raw_data |>
  group_by(ad_name) |>
  summarise(
    Impr = sum(impr, na.rm = TRUE),
    Clicks = sum(clicks, na.rm = TRUE),
    Purchases = sum(purchases, na.rm = TRUE),
    CTR = ifelse(Impr == 0, 0, Clicks / Impr),
    `Conv Rate` = ifelse(Clicks == 0, 0, Purchases / Clicks),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  arrange(desc(Purchases), desc(Clicks), desc(Impr))

ad_type_breakdown <- raw_data |>
  group_by(ad_type) |>
  summarise(
    Impr = sum(impr, na.rm = TRUE),
    Clicks = sum(clicks, na.rm = TRUE),
    Purchases = sum(purchases, na.rm = TRUE),
    CTR = ifelse(Impr == 0, 0, Clicks / Impr),
    `Conv Rate` = ifelse(Clicks == 0, 0, Purchases / Clicks),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  arrange(desc(Purchases), desc(Clicks), desc(Impr))

device_breakdown <- raw_data |>
  group_by(device) |>
  summarise(
    Impr = sum(impr, na.rm = TRUE),
    Clicks = sum(clicks, na.rm = TRUE),
    Purchases = sum(purchases, na.rm = TRUE),
    CTR = ifelse(Impr == 0, 0, Clicks / Impr),
    `Conv Rate` = ifelse(Clicks == 0, 0, Purchases / Clicks),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  arrange(desc(Purchases), desc(Clicks), desc(Impr))

state_breakdown <- raw_data |>
  group_by(state) |>
  summarise(
    Impr = sum(impr, na.rm = TRUE),
    Clicks = sum(clicks, na.rm = TRUE),
    Purchases = sum(purchases, na.rm = TRUE),
    CTR = ifelse(Impr == 0, 0, Clicks / Impr),
    `Conv Rate` = ifelse(Clicks == 0, 0, Purchases / Clicks),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  arrange(desc(Purchases), desc(Clicks), desc(Impr))
```

## Row {height="12%"}

### Column {width="34%"}

```{r}
bslib::value_box(
  title = "Total Impr",
  value = comma(total_impr),
  showcase = NULL,
  theme = "primary",
  min_height = "80px"
)
```

### Column {width="33%"}

```{r}
bslib::value_box(
  title = "Total Clicks",
  value = comma(total_clicks),
  showcase = NULL,
  theme = "success",
  min_height = "80px"
)
```

### Column {width="33%"}

```{r}
bslib::value_box(
  title = "Total Purchases",
  value = comma(total_purchases),
  showcase = NULL,
  theme = "warning",
  min_height = "80px"
)
```

## Row

### Column {width="60%"}

::: {.card title="Performance by Ad Name"}
```{r}
ad_name_breakdown |>
  select(ad_name, Impr, Clicks, Purchases, CTR, `Conv Rate`) |>
  rename(`Ad Name` = ad_name) |>
  gt() |>
  fmt_number(columns = c(Impr, Clicks, Purchases), decimals = 0, use_seps = TRUE) |>
  fmt_percent(columns = c(CTR, `Conv Rate`), decimals = 1)
```
:::

### Column {width="40%"}

::: {.card title="Performance by Ad Type"}
```{r}
ad_type_breakdown |>
  select(ad_type, Impr, Clicks, Purchases, CTR, `Conv Rate`) |>
  rename(`Ad Type` = ad_type) |>
  gt() |>
  fmt_number(columns = c(Impr, Clicks, Purchases), decimals = 0, use_seps = TRUE) |>
  fmt_percent(columns = c(CTR, `Conv Rate`), decimals = 1)
```
:::

## Row

### Column {width="40%"}

::: {.card title="Performance by Device"}
```{r}
device_breakdown |>
  select(device, Impr, Clicks, Purchases, CTR, `Conv Rate`) |>
  rename(Device = device) |>
  gt() |>
  fmt_number(columns = c(Impr, Clicks, Purchases), decimals = 0, use_seps = TRUE) |>
  fmt_percent(columns = c(CTR, `Conv Rate`), decimals = 1)
```
:::

### Column {width="60%"}

::: {.card title="Performance by State"}
```{r}
state_breakdown |>
  select(state, Impr, Clicks, Purchases, CTR, `Conv Rate`) |>
  rename(State = state) |>
  gt() |>
  fmt_number(columns = c(Impr, Clicks, Purchases), decimals = 0, use_seps = TRUE) |>
  fmt_percent(columns = c(CTR, `Conv Rate`), decimals = 1)
```
:::
